title: United States Passport Renewal by Mail (Form DS-82)
description: Renewal of a U.S. passport book and/or card by mail for eligible adults using Department of State Form DS-82. This document describes the eligibility conditions, the applicant inputs, and the by-mail flow. It does not submit the form; the live travel.state.gov source is always authoritative (see verification).

authority.name: U.S. Department of State, Bureau of Consular Affairs

verification.verifiedBy: GovSchema Engineering (Standards Engineer — independent second-reviewer pass)
verification.notes: Independent second-reviewer field-by-field comparison (manual-source-review-v1 Procedure steps 2-3) against the live 'Renew Your Passport by Mail' page and the current fillable Form DS-82 (Rev. 04-2025) — its printed instructions (extracted via pdfjs-dist page text) and its 71-widget AcroForm field set (enumerated via pdf-lib). See VERIFICATION.md for the full discrepancy list, the four corrections to already-published fields, and the reasoning for a MAJOR (not MINOR) version bump. status advances to 'verified'.

fields.name: canSubmitMostRecentPassport
fields.label: I can submit my most recent U.S. passport book and/or card with this application.
fields.description: Your most recent U.S. passport book and/or card must be mailed in with the application.

fields.name: passportIssuedAge16OrOlder
fields.label: I was at least 16 years old when my most recent U.S. passport book and/or card was issued.
fields.description: Passports issued to applicants under age 16 generally cannot be renewed by mail; you cannot renew a passport for a child under 16.

fields.name: passportIssuedWithin15Years
fields.label: I was issued my most recent U.S. passport book and/or card less than 15 years ago.
fields.description: Count from the issue date printed on your passport to today. A passport issued 15 years ago or more is not eligible for renewal by mail.

fields.name: passportNotMutilatedDamagedOrLostStolen
fields.label: The U.S. passport book and/or card that I am renewing has not been mutilated, damaged, or reported lost or stolen.
fields.description: A single combined attestation on the current form (Rev. 04-2025): if your most recent passport has been mutilated, damaged (beyond normal wear and tear), or was ever reported lost or stolen, you cannot renew by mail and must apply in person on Form DS-11.

fields.name: passportNotLimitedValidity
fields.label: My U.S. passport was not limited to less than the normal ten-year validity period due to passport damage/mutilation, multiple passport thefts/losses, or non-compliance with 22 C.F.R. 51.41.
fields.description: Refer to the endorsement page (last page) of your U.S. passport book for any limited-validity notation.

fields.name: nameMatchesOrHaveDocumentation
fields.label: My name has not changed since my most recent U.S. passport book and/or card was issued -- OR -- my name has changed by marriage or court order and I can submit proper certified documentation to reflect the name change.
fields.description: Answer yes if the name on your passport is your current name, or if you can provide a certified marriage certificate or court order showing a name change by marriage or court order. Other name-change reasons are not covered by this form.

fields.name: lastName
fields.label: Last name (as it should appear on the passport)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: firstName
fields.label: First name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: middleName
fields.label: Middle name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: Date of birth
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Full date, YYYY-MM-DD.

fields.name: placeOfBirth
fields.label: Place of birth (city and state, or city and country)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: sexMarker
fields.label: Sex marker to appear on the passport
fields.description: Per Form DS-82 (Rev. 04-2025) instructions, Section C item 3: "You must select sex marker option 'M' (male) or 'F' (female) that corresponds with your biological sex at birth."

fields.name: socialSecurityNumber
fields.label: Social Security number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Enter your 9-digit U.S. Social Security number. Federal law requires it for a passport application; if you have never been issued one, the live form provides an alternative attestation.

fields.name: mailingAddressLine1
fields.label: Mailing address — street address
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: mailingAddressLine2
fields.label: Mailing address — "In Care Of" (only if you do not live at this address)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Complete only if you do not live at the mailing address given in line 1: enter the name of the person who does, and mark it "In Care Of" (Form DS-82 Section C item 8).

fields.name: mailingAddressCity
fields.label: Mailing address — city
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: mailingAddressState
fields.label: Mailing address — state or territory
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Two-letter USPS state or territory abbreviation, e.g. CA, NY, TX.

fields.name: mailingAddressPostalCode
fields.label: Mailing address — ZIP code
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. 5-digit or ZIP+4 format, e.g. 90210 or 90210-1234.

fields.name: mailingAddressCountry
fields.label: Mailing address — country
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Defaults to the United States; provide the country name if your mailing address is outside the U.S.

fields.name: permanentAddressLine1
fields.label: Permanent address — street address (only if different from your mailing address)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Complete only if your permanent address is different from your mailing address, or if your mailing address is a P.O. Box.

fields.name: permanentAddressLine2
fields.label: Permanent address — apartment, suite, or unit (optional)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: permanentAddressCity
fields.label: Permanent address — city
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: permanentAddressState
fields.label: Permanent address — state or territory
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Two-letter USPS state or territory abbreviation.

fields.name: permanentAddressPostalCode
fields.label: Permanent address — ZIP code
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. 5-digit or ZIP+4 format.

fields.name: permanentAddressCountry
fields.label: Permanent address — country
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: email
fields.label: Email address
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. A valid email address.

fields.name: phone
fields.label: Phone number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. In international E.164 format, e.g. +12025551234.

fields.name: height
fields.label: Height (optional)
fields.description: Optional physical description, for identification purposes only; not printed in the current passport book.

fields.name: hairColor
fields.label: Hair color (optional)
fields.description: Optional physical description, for identification purposes only.

fields.name: eyeColor
fields.label: Eye color (optional)
fields.description: Optional physical description, for identification purposes only.

fields.name: occupationOrEmployer
fields.label: Occupation, and employer or school name (optional)
fields.description: Optional identifying information.

fields.name: otherNamesUsed
fields.label: List all other names you have used (only if applicable)
fields.description: Enter all legal names previously used, including maiden name and previous married names. Leave blank if none. (Form DS-82 Section C item 9.)
fields.sourceRef: DS-82 — List all other names you have used

fields.name: additionalContactPhone
fields.label: Additional contact phone number (optional)
fields.description: An additional phone number where you can be reached, if different from your primary phone number.

fields.name: mostRecentPassportFullName
fields.label: Full name as printed on your most recent passport
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.
fields.sourceRef: DS-82 — Most Recent Passport: Name as printed

fields.name: mostRecentPassportNumber
fields.label: Most recent passport number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. The number printed on the passport book or card you are renewing. U.S. passport numbers are typically 6 to 9 characters; older books may be all digits and newer ones may begin with a letter.
fields.sourceRef: DS-82 — Most Recent Passport: Passport Number

fields.name: mostRecentPassportIssueDate
fields.label: Issue date of your most recent passport
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Full date, YYYY-MM-DD.
fields.sourceRef: DS-82 — Most Recent Passport: Issue Date

fields.name: nameChangeDocument
fields.label: Name-change document (only if your current name differs from the passport)
fields.description: A certified copy of a marriage certificate, divorce decree, or court order. Required only if the name on your most recent passport is not your current name. Provide as PDF, JPEG, or PNG; the live source publishes size limits.

fields.name: nameChangeDate
fields.label: Date your name changed (only if applicable)
fields.description: Complete only if the name on your most recent passport is not your current name.

fields.name: nameChangePlace
fields.label: Place your name changed (only if applicable)
fields.description: Complete only if the name on your most recent passport is not your current name.

fields.name: nameChangedByMarriage
fields.label: Name changed by marriage (only if applicable)
fields.description: Complete only if the name on your most recent passport is not your current name.

fields.name: nameChangedByCourtOrder
fields.label: Name changed by court order (only if applicable)
fields.description: Complete only if the name on your most recent passport is not your current name.

fields.name: photo
fields.label: Passport photo
fields.description: One color photograph meeting the published U.S. passport photo requirements (2x2 inches, plain background, taken within the last 6 months). Provide as JPEG or PNG; the live source publishes size limits.

fields.name: emergencyContactName
fields.label: Emergency contact — full name (optional)
fields.description: Optional. A person to contact in an emergency while your application is in process.

fields.name: emergencyContactRelationship
fields.label: Emergency contact — relationship to you (optional)
fields.description: Optional.

fields.name: emergencyContactAddressLine1
fields.label: Emergency contact — street address (optional)
fields.description: Optional.

fields.name: emergencyContactAddressLine2
fields.label: Emergency contact — apartment, suite, or unit (optional)
fields.description: Optional.

fields.name: emergencyContactCity
fields.label: Emergency contact — city (optional)
fields.description: Optional.

fields.name: emergencyContactState
fields.label: Emergency contact — state or territory (optional)
fields.description: Optional. Two-letter USPS state or territory abbreviation.

fields.name: emergencyContactPostalCode
fields.label: Emergency contact — ZIP code (optional)
fields.description: Optional. 5-digit or ZIP+4 format.

fields.name: emergencyContactCountry
fields.label: Emergency contact — country (optional)
fields.description: Optional.

fields.name: emergencyContactPhone
fields.label: Emergency contact — phone number (optional)
fields.description: Optional. In international E.164 format, e.g. +12025551234.

fields.name: emergencyContactEmail
fields.label: Emergency contact — email address (optional)
fields.description: Optional.

fields.name: travelDepartureDate
fields.label: Upcoming travel departure date (optional)
fields.description: Optional. Complete only if you have imminent travel plans that require your passport.

fields.name: travelReturnDate
fields.label: Upcoming travel return date (optional)
fields.description: Optional. Complete only if you have imminent travel plans that require your passport.

fields.name: countriesToBeVisited
fields.label: Countries to be visited (optional)
fields.description: Optional. Complete only if you have imminent travel plans that require your passport.

fields.name: passportBookSize
fields.label: Passport book size
fields.description: regular = Standard passport book; large = Large-format passport book with additional visa pages. Only applicable when renewing a passport book.

fields.name: productRequested
fields.label: What are you renewing?
fields.description: book = Passport book; card = Passport card; book_and_card = Both passport book and card.

fields.name: serviceSpeed
fields.label: Processing speed
fields.description: routine = Routine service; expedited = Expedited service (additional fee, faster). Current processing times and fees are published on the live source.

fields.name: paymentMethod
fields.label: Payment method
fields.description: check = Personal check; money_order = Money order. Renewals by mail are paid by personal check or money order payable to the U.S. Department of State. Confirm the current fee on the live source.
fields.sourceRef: Required submission: payment by check or money order

steps.title: Check you can renew by mail
